productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Blue Pedal Pusher
description: Style Note Room-to-grow style pedal pusher for your little girl from gini and jony. Designed for her comfort and tailored to Fit her growing body - now that should make you and your little one happy. Buy this before stocks run out! Product Details Blue denim pedal pusher with a button and zipper closure at the waist, two patch pockets on the front, two patch pockets at the back, embroidery at the left leg and a blue removable chain at the loops for style Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
